current.summary: Discovered Phase 8 (Toasts) is implemented but needs polish: copy broken, missing close button, need minimum width

activeWork.description: Phase 8 Toast Notifications polish - fixing copy mechanism, adding close button, setting minimum width
activeWork.progress: Created comprehensive prompt identifying three issues: (1) OSC 52 copy broken because BubbleTea alt screen swallows Printf output, (2) need clickable close button in addition to [esc] hint, (3) need minimum width to prevent layout jank. Ready to implement.

git.lastCommit: 0be34fb fix: preFilterType discovery never started — advanceFromSource returns cmd

recentDecisions: Toast infrastructure already exists (Phase 8 listed as 'Not started' in roadmap, but implementation is complete)
Root cause analysis: tea.Printf for OSC 52 doesn't work in alt screen mode — need BubbleTea clipboard API or raw stdout approach
User confirmed copy doesn't work + identified two additional UX gaps: missing close button and layout jank from no minimum width
nextSteps: Research BubbleTea v1.x clipboard support in current dependencies (go.mod)
Implement copy via SetClipboard() or ExecProcess/raw stdout fallback
Add clickable close button (×) to toast View with mouse zone marking
Set minimum width on toasts to prevent layout shift
Update toast tests to cover close button interaction
Run full TUI test suite and update golden files if needed
